ADTEXT_1.message: GEOLOGICAL SURVEY: Data from {system} system ({dist} ly) wanted

INTROTEXT_1.message: Hello, my name is {name} xxx. We are interested in updating the map we have for {systembody} in {system} ({sectorx}, {sectory}, {sectorz}), ({dist} ly) for which we will pay {cash}.

SUCCESSMSG_1.message: Thanks for the information. Agreed amount was transferred to your account.

WHYSOMUCH_1.message: It is our standard fee for these services.

ADTEXT_2.message: CARTOGRAPHER NEED: Contract for pilot to {system}, ({dist} ly)

INTROTEXT_2.message: Hello. I'm {name}. I'll pay {cash} for mapping of {systembody} in {system} ({sectorx}, {sectory}, {sectorz}), {dist} ly distant.

SUCCESSMSG_2.message: I have received the data, and I'm transferring the money now.

WHYSOMUCH_2.message: We demand high quality maps generated from low altitude, and we pay accordingly.

ADTEXT_3.message: PLANETARY MAPPING NEEDED: For {system} system, ({dist} ly)

INTROTEXT_3.message: Greetings. You may call me {name}. I am willing to pay {cash} for a thorough scan of {systembody} in {system} ({sectorx}, {sectory}, {sectorz}) located some {dist} ly from here.

SUCCESSMSG_3.message: Map has been received, and is being processed. Your payment has been transferred.

WHYSOMUCH_3.message: I'm expecting high yield on this investment, if I find what I'm looking for.

INTROTEXT_4.message: Hi! My name is {name}, and I'm doing some research on the {system} system ({sectorx}, {sectory}, {sectorz}), {dist} ly from here. I need to get some additional data for {systembody} in form of updated maps. I will pay {cash} to pilot that can deliver this information to me in time.

SUCCESSMSG_4.message: Thank you! This new data will hopefully help my revolutionizing research.

WHYSOMUCH_4.description: high impact journals is a recognized term for journals like Nature and Science, yielding many citations.
WHYSOMUCH_4.message: I'm hoping this new data will really get my article published in some high impact journal.

ADTEXT_5.message: CARTOGRAPHY CONTRACT: Mapping of planet in {system} system ({dist} ly)

INTROTEXT_5.message: Hello. My name is {name}. Information is my business and I'll pay {cash} for a mapping of {systembody} in {system} ({sectorx}, {sectory}, {sectorz}) which is {dist} ly from our present location.

SUCCESSMSG_5.message: Thank you for your effort. Payment has been made in full.

WHYSOMUCH_5.message: You can not put a price on information

ADTEXT_6.message: MAP UPDATE: Our administration needs help to update maps for {systembody}

INTROTEXT_6.message: I'm with the administration of {system}, my name is {name}. We need to update our files and are willing to award you with {cash} for updating our information on {systembody}.

WHYSOMUCH_6.message: Working for the government has its benefits.

ADTEXT_7.message: MAP UPDATE: Urgent data needed for {systembody}

INTROTEXT_7.message: Hello! I am {name}, and my family is in urgent need to find more land. We will pay {cash} for good survey data on {systembody}.

SUCCESSMSG_7.message: We appreciate the quick work, pilot. Their money has been transferred.

ADTEXT_8.message: CARTOGRAPHY ORDER: Update of data for {systembody} needed

INTROTEXT_8.message: Hi! I'm with the geographical society, and we need to update our maps of {systembody}. We are willing to pay {cash} for such an endeavour.

SUCCESSMSG_8.message: Another map to the collection. Please find our appreciation reflected on your bank account.

WHYSOMUCH_8.message: The worlds must be documented and mapped.

ADTEXT_9.message: MAPPING: Will pay for fast delivery of data on {systembody} in {system} ({dist} ly)

INTROTEXT_9.message: Hi!, I'm {name}. Me and my family need a detailed survey of {systembody} in {system} ({sectorx}, {sectory}, {sectorz}), before anyone else claims it. For a fast pilot we will pay {cash}.

SUCCESSMSG_9.message: Your punctuality and discretion is appreciated.

WHYSOMUCH_9.description: scooped as in missing an exclusive unique opportunity
WHYSOMUCH_9.message: We do not want to be scooped on this possible acquisition

Distance_reached.message: DISTANCE REACHED. MAPPING. Keep in orbit

INTROTEXT_COMPLETED_1.message:
Hello. If you are seeing this is because the data were obtained and confirmed what we suspected.
See you at:

INTROTEXT_COMPLETED_2.message:
Hello. If you are seeing this is because the data were successfully mapped. Will be very useful to my friends.
 To complete the mission, you must go to:

INTROTEXT_COMPLETED_3.message:
Greetings again. Apparently, the mission has been a success.
You must carry this information to:

INTROTEXT_COMPLETED_4.message:
Hello. What you are seeing this means that the data collected are very interesting and will be very useful to my editor.
 The delivery shall be in:

INTROTEXT_COMPLETED_5.message:
Hello. If you are seeing this is that the mission is successful now. The data will be very useful.
 Your reward awaits you in:

INTROTEXT_COMPLETED_6.message:
You are viewing this because, surely, the first part of mission has been successful.
 To complete it should be directed to:

INTROTEXT_COMPLETED_7.message: If you are seeing this, the first part of mission seems to have been successful. To complete it you directed to:

PLEASE_HAVE_THE_DATA_BACK_BEFORE.message: Please have the data back before {date}

ACCEPT_AND_SET_SYSTEM_TARGET.message:
Accept and set system target
in the navigation chart.

REPEAT_THE_ORIGINAL_REQUEST.message: Can you please repeat the original request?

WHEN_DO_YOU_NEED_THE_DATA.message: When do you need the data?

YOU_NEED_RADAR_MAPPER.description: Radar Mapper is a ship equipment
YOU_NEED_RADAR_MAPPER.message: Your ship must have a Radar Mapper to perform this task.

YOU_WILL_BE_PAID_ON_MY_BEHALF_AT_NEW_DES.message: You will be paid on my behalf at the NEW DESTINATION

ADDITIONAL_INFORMATION.message:
you will program your mapper with what I'm looking for. This program will make decisions for me and report back to your computer. If you should come here, or bring the data to another system, depends on what you find. It may occur that I'll change the delivery destination to another more convenient system. You must be alert and assured of enough fuel and time.
This does not apply to local missions.

failed_mission.message:
This mission has failed due to exceeding the expiry date. Sorry.
Has started and will end soon, the clean of all traces of this mapped.

This has never happened, Commander.

suspended_mission.message: The mapping process has been interrupted. You are far from the target. To continue, you must properly correct the orbit to restart the process.
